category_sources: Official GNOME VTE docs identify it as VTE documentation and the GNOME wiki calls it the VTE Terminal Widget Library.
source_facts.description says vte3 is a terminal emulator widget used by GNOME Terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME documentation title uses Vte/VTE.
source_facts.homepage is the GNOME VTE page.
docs_sources: Official GNOME GitLab Pages site is the API documentation.
Official GNOME wiki page links the API docs and repository.
repo_sources: Official GNOME API docs show source as gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/vte.
Official GNOME wiki lists the VTE Git repository.
tags_sources: Official GNOME docs identify VTE as a library/widget with API documentation.
source_facts.description identifies a GNOME terminal emulator widget.
